title: The Gate Drill
description: Set two tees just wider than your ball halfway between your ball and the hole. Tiger Woods famously practiced this from about four feet to groove his stroke path. Miss the gate or miss the putt and it doesn't count.
success_target: 8 out of 10 putts made through the gate

title: The Clock Drill / Circle 8
description: Place 8 to 12 balls in a circle around the hole. Moving clockwise, you must make all putts in a row.
penalty_reset_rule: If you miss one putt, you must start over from ball one.
success_target: Complete the entire circle without a restart

title: Lag Putting Knockout
description: Set up at 30, 40, and 50 feet, hitting three putts from each distance. Score 1 point for every putt that finishes within 3 feet of the hole, and score 0 for anything outside.
penalty_reset_rule: Miss the 3-foot circle three times in a row from any distance and you are knocked out (session over).
success_target: Score 7+ out of 9 points

title: The Streak Builder
description: Pick a distance and make consecutive putts. Your score is your longest streak per session.
penalty_reset_rule: Miss and the streak resets to zero.
success_target: A streak of 10 consecutive makes from 4 feet

title: One-Handed Putts
description: Putt with your right hand only to feel the putter head and develop delicate touch. Focus on stroke path and impact quality rather than making putts.
success_target: 8 out of 10 solid strikes

title: The 3-6-9 Drill
description: Place a tee at 3 feet, 6 feet, and 9 feet in a straight line from the hole. You have to make 3 putts in a row from all three tee locations.
penalty_reset_rule: If you miss any putt, even the 9th putt in the drill, you have to start over at the beginning.
success_target: Complete all 9 putts in succession

title: The Ladder Drill
description: Place a ball at 3 feet, 6 feet, 9 feet, 12 feet, and 15 feet in a straight line. Start at 3 feet, and if you make it, move to 6 feet. Your goal is to climb the full ladder.
penalty_reset_rule: Miss at any distance and you must go back one rung on the ladder.
success_target: Complete the full ladder in under 10 attempts

title: Speed Ladder
description: Place two tees approximately 18-20 feet apart on a flat spot. Roll the first putt towards the second tee, and every subsequent putt must come to rest shorter than the previous ball without rolling past it. You must fit all 10 balls between the tees.
penalty_reset_rule: If you roll a ball past the previous ball, you must gather all balls and start over.
success_target: Fit all 10 balls in succession between the tees

title: The 6-Foot Test
description: Make putts from 6 feet to practice the scoring zone. This distance determines if you convert birdie chances and save pars.
success_target: Make 6 out of 10 putts

title: The Lag-It Drill
description: Lay a club about 18 inches directly behind the hole, perpendicular to the line of the putt. Hit putts trying to get the ball past the hole, but without hitting the club.
success_target: Score a high point total based on: 1 pt for stopping past the hole but before the club, 2 pts for a made putt, 0 pts for stopping short or hitting the club.

title: Par 18 / 9-Hole Match
description: Pick nine spots around the practice green of varying distances and angles. Treat each hole as a par 2, and play the 9 holes keeping score.
success_target: Shoot a score of 18 or lower, with an elite target of 14 or under

title: 25 in a row from 3'
description: Place 6 tee pegs around one hole at a 3-foot distance. Work your way around the circle until you hole 25 putts in a row. If you miss one, you must start again. Then start going the opposite direction.
penalty_reset_rule: Miss a putt and the streak resets to zero.
success_target: Make 25 consecutive putts

title: 20 in a row from 20 feet stopping in a 3 foot circle
description: Mark a 3-foot circle around the hole using tees, leaving a small gap for balls to enter. Hit lag putts from 20 feet. Only use 3 balls so they don't knock into each other in the circle. The goal is to get 20 in a row inside the circle.
penalty_reset_rule: If a ball stops outside the 3-foot circle, the streak resets to zero.
success_target: 20 consecutive putts inside the circle

title: 20 in a row from 30 feet stopping in a 3 foot circle
description: Mark a 3-foot circle around the hole. Using exactly 3 balls to prevent collisions, hit lag putts from 30 feet. Your goal is 20 in a row inside the safe zone.
penalty_reset_rule: If a ball stops outside the 3-foot circle, the streak resets to zero.
success_target: 20 consecutive putts inside the circle

title: 20 in a row from 45 feet stopping in a 3 foot circle
description: Mark a 3-foot circle around the hole. Using exactly 3 balls, hit lag putts from 45 feet. Your goal is 20 in a row inside the circle.
penalty_reset_rule: If a ball stops outside the 3-foot circle, the streak resets to zero.
success_target: 20 consecutive putts inside the circle

title: Killer
description: Put tee pegs in a straight line starting at 3 feet from the hole, and at 1-foot intervals out to 10 feet. You have 3 'lives' (3 balls). Start at 3 feet. Hole a putt, and move back to the next tee. If you miss, you lose a life and stay on that tee until you hole one.
penalty_reset_rule: Miss a putt, lose a life. Run out of all 3 lives and the game is over.
success_target: Hole the final 10-foot putt without losing all 3 lives

title: Overtake game
description: Place a starting tee. Take 2 decent-sized steps forward and place a second tee, then 3 strides forward to place a third tee. The first putt must pass the first tee but stop before the second. Each subsequent putt must overtake the previous ball without passing the final tee. 1 point for a successful overtake, minus 1 point if short. Game over if a ball passes the final tee.
penalty_reset_rule: Game over if any putt rolls past the final tee.
success_target: Score 10 points

title: 3-foot compass
description: Hit a 3-foot putt from the four opposite sides of the hole (downhill, uphill, left-to-right, right-to-left). If your practice green has 9 holes, do this once on each of the 9 holes for 36 total putts.
success_target: Make 36 out of 36

title: 6-foot compass
description: Hit a 6-foot putt from the four opposite sides of the hole (downhill, uphill, left-to-right, right-to-left). Repeat this on 9 holes of the practice green for a total of 36 putts.
success_target: Make 25 out of 36 (PGA Tour Average is 17.59% from 6 feet)

title: 20 tee game
description: Find a hole with room around it. Set out 20 tees at 1-foot intervals starting 3 feet from the hole on 4 diagonals (downhill L-R, downhill R-L, uphill L-R, uphill R-L). Take each tee peg out once you hole a putt from that spot. Keep a running count of total putts hit (both makes and misses).
tracking_metrics: Total Putts Taken to Clear 20 Tees
success_target: Clear all tees in as few total putts as possible (Perfect score is 20)

title: 10-foot putt challenge
description: Place a tee peg 10 feet from the hole. The goal is to reach 10 points as quickly as you can. You get 2 points for holing a putt, but you lose 1 point anytime you leave a putt short or 3-putt. Keep track of the total number of putts it takes you to reach 10 points.
tracking_metrics: Total Putts Taken to Reach 10 Points
success_target: 5 putts (Perfect score: holing the first 5 putts)
